name: Sausage Dumplings
recipeInstructions:
1. Form the sausage into 12 balls and brown them in a pan.
2. Cook the sausage thoroughly until it is well-browned.
3. Wrap each ball of sausage in dough made from the pie crust.
4. Bake the dumplings at 400°F for 10 minutes.
5. While the dumplings are baking, sauté the onions in the sausage grease until they are browned.
6. Add flour and water to the sautéed onions to create a gravy.
7. Season the gravy with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Pour the prepared gravy over the dumplings before serving.
